ZSNAP_F01S_105.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: Determines which cash discounts are still capturable vs already lost for open items based on P_KeyDate vs discount dates. Also derives net due arrears days and converts amounts to display currency.
ZSNAP_F01S_105.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.purpos: Calculates available and missed discount amounts for open items with currency conversion
ZSNAP_F01S_105.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F01: Open Items Net Due Arrears

ZSNAP_F01S_205.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: Determines discount capture results for cleared items: claimed discounts (captured on time), missed discounts (lost due to late payment). Also performs currency conversion and adds DPO period metrics.
ZSNAP_F01S_205.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.purpos: Calculates claimed and missed discount amounts for cleared items with currency conversion
ZSNAP_F01S_205.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F01: Cleared Items Derivations

ZSNAP_F01S_F72103.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.LEDGER,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.SOURCELEDGER,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN.SPECIALPERIOD,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARPERIOD,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	TO_VARCHAR (_FISCALPERIOD.FISCALPERIODENDDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as FISCALPERIODENDDATE,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	:P_SIGNAGE as SIGNAGE,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINTRANSCRCY,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINCOCODECRCY,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINGLOBALCRCY,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY
from ZSNAP_F01S_F72050(:P_SFROMFISCALYEAR, :P_STOFISCALYEARPERIOD) as MAIN
left outer join ZSNAP_F01G_FISCALPERIODFORVARIANT as _FISCALPERIOD on MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT = _FISCALPERIOD.FISCALYEARVARIANT and MAIN.FISCALYEAR = _FISCALPERIOD.FISCALYEAR and MAIN.SPECIALPERIOD = _FISCALPERIOD.FISCALPERIOD
union all select
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.LEDGER,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.SOURCELEDGER,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN.SPECIALPERIOD,
	cast (MAIN.FISCALYEARPERIOD as NVARCHAR(7)) as FISCALYEARPERIOD,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN.FISCALPERIODENDDATE,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	:P_SIGNAGE as SIGNAGE,
	MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINTRANSCRCY,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINCOCODECRCY,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINGLOBALCRCY,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY
from ZSNAP_F01S_F72060(:P_SFROMFISCALYEAR, :P_STOFISCALYEARPERIOD) as MAIN
where MAIN.FISCALYEAR >= :P_SFROMFISCALYEAR;
ZSNAP_F01S_F72103.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F72: Activity/Balances Union

ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: SNAP: Net Due Interval by Date
ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.NETDUEDATE,
	MAIN.NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL0(:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS) as MAIN
union all select
	MAIN.NETDUEDATE,
	MAIN.NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL1(:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS) as MAIN
union all select
	MAIN.NETDUEDATE,
	MAIN.NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL2(:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS) as MAIN
union all select
	MAIN.NETDUEDATE,
	MAIN.NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL3(:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS) as MAIN
union all select
	MAIN.NETDUEDATE,
	MAIN.NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL4(:P_KEYDATE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS) as MAIN;
ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: Net Due Interval by Date
